CARGO_PILE.title: Cargo Pile
CARGO_PILE.description:
At the start of each turn,
an extra card is drawn from here.

Click to view the cards in your Cargo pile (in order).
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LOAD_AMMO.title: Ammo
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-LOAD_AMMO.description: Once loaded, [gold]Ammo[/gold] may be fired at any time, dealing 12 damage to a random enemy (scaling with Strength).
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-AMMO_BUTTON.title: FIRE!
INTOTHESPIREVERSE-AMMO_BUTTON.descriptio:
Deal {Damage} damage to a random enemy.

This does not count as playing a card.
